audit_items.proof_trace: nfp_target.c contains zero dynamic memory allocations: grep for kmalloc/kzalloc/vmalloc/GFP_* returns no matches across all 743 lines. Every function in the file is a pure computational routine operating exclusively on stack-allocated integers and caller-provided pointers, so the property 'forall alloc(p): exists free(p)' is vacuously satisfied.
